payload.label: oven
payload.long_description: Front-facing stainless steel oven with a dark glass window and a pair of white decorative towels draped over the handle; lower storage/drawer panel visible, slight reflections on metal surface, and the appliance is partially edge-cropped — photographed at approximately 1.0 m from the camera.
